title: carex vesicaria subsp. friesii
intro: Carex vesicaria subsp. friesii, also known as Fries' bladder sedge, is a subspecies of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Carex vesicaria subsp. friesii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Carex vesicaria subsp. friesii can be consumed as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support kidney and urinary health.
